body:
### 🇨🇳 中文更新日志
* 🌐 **多服务器管理与 SSH 隧道**：支持多台 Unraid 服务器无缝切换与独立的 SSH 隧道加密穿透，不同服务器间的连接与文件缓存彻底隔离。
* 🔒 **SSH 密码一键防爆破**：新增 SSH 状态检测与一键安全加固开关，彻底关闭密码登录与交互式质询，100% 抵御 SSH 暴力破解。
* 🔑 **Pro 授权扩展**：Pro 激活码全面支持同时绑定 3 台设备，可在 App 内随时查看额度与刷新状态。
* 🎨 **多服务器卡片 UI 升级**：新增高亮「活动中」连接标识，大幅放大切换与删除按钮的触控热区并加入悬停动画，优化移动端点击体验。
* 🚀 **PDF 与图片预览秒开**：引入 PDF 与图片专属本地磁盘缓存机制，再次查看同一文档或照片秒级呈现，免去重复传输。

### 🇺🇸 English Changelog
* 🌐 **Multi-Server & SSH Tunneling**: Supports seamless switching among multiple Unraid servers with independent SSH encrypted tunneling and connection isolation.
* 🔒 **One-Click SSH Hardening**: Added SSH status detection and one-click security toggle to completely block password login and prevent brute-force attacks.
* 🔑 **Pro 3-Device Binding**: Pro activation codes now support binding up to 3 devices simultaneously with real-time status refreshing.
* 🎨 **Multi-Server Card UI Overhaul**: Added prominent "Active" badges with enlarged button touch targets and hover animations for better mobile touch controls.
* 🚀 **Instant PDF & Image Preview**: Integrated dedicated local disk caching for instant PDF and image re-opening without re-downloading.
